top_signals.title: Arrest warrant issued for man suspected of Hyogo mother-daughter murder
top_signals.summary: Kenji Oyama, 42, emerged as a suspect based on forensic analysis and security camera footage from around the scene.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jardines to buy Australian radiology group in $2.4bn deal
top_signals.summary: Acquisition of I-MED is Hong Kong-based conglomerate’s first since strategic overhaul

top_signals.title: Father still searching for answers 29 years after Kobe child murders
top_signals.summary: For 70-year-old Mamoru Hase, whose son was one of two elementary schoolchildren killed by a 14-year-old boy in 1997, there is no such thing as closure.
